description:
2 Week roadtrip through a country that feels like heaven on earth, New Zealand
Get 5% off hotels on Expedia by using code BRETT  https://expedia.com/affiliates/brettconti/
My New Zealand Travel Shop for places I stayed https://www.expedia.com/shop/brettconti/new-zealand

*(Save 5% on select Expedia hotel bookings when you book by August 2025 and travel by August 2026. Terms apply.)

Itinerary
- Arrive in Auckland
- Headed to Hobbiton Movie set https://expedia.com/affiliate/uaqwzAY
- White water rafting with Rotorua Rafting https://expedia.com/affiliate/gmLoQf6
- Taumatawhakatangihangakoauauotamateaturipukakapikimaungahoronukupokaiwhenuakitanatahu
- Surfing one of the world's longest left breaks in Raglan
- Arrive in Christchurch and head towards Lake Tecapo
- Hike Hooker Valley Track
- Hike Roy's Peak
- Cruise on the Milford Sound https://expedia.com/affiliate/yTOx3TI
- Stay at Sherwood and use code BRETT at checkout https://expedia.com/affiliates/brettconti/sherwood
- Skyline Luge in Queenstown
- Bungee Jump off Kawarau Bridge

Thanks to @RaCostelloe for letting us use his Open Road song
